items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Stellus Capital to be acquired by P10 in deal to expand lower middle-market platform
items.snippet: Stellus Capital Management agreed to be acquired by P10 Inc., a private markets firm with $40B AUM, while retaining its management and investment processes.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Stellus redeems $50M of 4.875% notes due 2026 in full on December 31, 2025
items.snippet: Stellus Investment Corporation notified holders it will redeem all $50M of its 4.875% notes due 2026 at par plus make-whole premium on December 31, 2025.

items.headline_ai: Stellus partially redeems $50M of 4.875% notes due 2026 on September 30, 2025
items.snippet: Stellus Investment Corporation notified holders it will redeem $50M of its $100M 4.875% notes due 2026 at par plus make-whole premium on September 30, 2025.

items.headline_ai: Stellus Capital hosts investor day to showcase lower middle-market direct lending platform
items.snippet: Stellus Capital Investment Corporation hosted an investor day on December 14, 2021 presenting its credit strategy and direct lending platform.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Other Events
8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Stellus redeems all $48.9M of 5.75% senior notes due 2022 on February 12
items.snippet: Stellus notified holders it will redeem all $48.875M outstanding of its 5.75% senior notes due 2022 at par plus accrued interest on February 12, 2021.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Stellus amends and extends $230M revolving credit facility to September 2025
items.snippet: Stellus Capital amended its $230M revolving credit facility, extending commitment termination to September 18, 2024 and final maturity to September 18, 2025.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Stellus reports no new non-accruals in Q2 2020, declares $0.25 quarterly dividend
items.snippet: Stellus reported all borrowers current in Q2 2020 with no new non-accruals, declared a $0.25/share quarterly dividend, and noted NAV expected to increase.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Stellus upsizes revolving credit facility to $230M, extends maturity to March 2021
items.snippet: Stellus increased its revolving credit facility commitments to $230M and extended the commitment termination date to March 10, 2021.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Stellus shifts dividend from monthly to quarterly starting Q2 2020 amid COVID-19
items.snippet: Stellus announced it will change its dividend from monthly ($0.1133/share) to quarterly payments starting with Q2 2020 to better match income timing.
